standard_deduction.source: California Franchise Tax Board deductions page, 2025 standard deduction amounts

itemized_deductions.home_mortgage_interest_note: California may allow home mortgage interest on home purchases up to $1,000,000, while federal rules may differ.
itemized_deductions.miscellaneous_itemized_note: Certain miscellaneous itemized deductions may be allowed for California when federal law disallows them.
itemized_deductions.gambling_losses_note: For tax years 2025 and before, gambling deductions are limited to gambling winnings.
itemized_deductions.source: California Franchise Tax Board deductions page, common itemized deductions

state_tax_brackets.note: Use FTB 2025 Form 540 tax tables or calculator for exact California tax computations. TaxMax agents should not compute final CA tax from this lightweight context.

credits.note: California-specific credits require verified form-level facts before user-facing guidance.

notes: California has a lower standard deduction than the IRS.
California does not conform to all federal itemized deductions.
State context is for opportunity review only, not final state tax computation.
